ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data entry */,
  "days" INTEGER /* Day count for the stock's trading history */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price for the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price for the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price for the stock during the trading session */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price for the stock during the trading session */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume for the stock on the given date */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ticker */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickers" (
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock ticker */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the stock (e.g., AAPL for Apple) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company associated with the ticker */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the user's portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio's investment strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated portfolio */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares owned */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the shares were purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price per share at the time of purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_logs" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the trade */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share at the time of trade */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission paid for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker to monitor */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, decrease) */,
  "trigger_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert is triggered */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_alerts_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on the analysis (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, trade execution) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the market index */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the index */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector represented by the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters associated with the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy's logic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtest_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtest result */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy being tested */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtest period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtest period */,
  "profit" REAL /* Total profit generated during the backtest */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the trading strategy during the backtest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtest_results_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_generators" (
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal generator */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy using the generator */,
  "generator_type" TEXT /* Type of signal generator (e.g., moving average, RSI) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters associated with the generator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_generators_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk management rule */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of risk management rule (e.g., stop-loss, position sizing) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters associated with the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters associated with the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
